calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2008 Continued To Sep-05-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-22-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Christina Dondero, Esq. for Plaintiff: Niesar & Whyte, LLP. and as a Witness, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony, considering of the filed declartion and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Xslent Energy Technologies, LLC. as follows:
Damages $30,390.98
Prejudgment Interest $1,715.98
Costs $393.00, for a total of $32,499.96
Judgment signed in open court.
